description: Phase 3 speech-pipeline config (see IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md). Controls which ASR backend to use, the model, device/compute defaults, and optional pre-processing steps.
backend_description: whisperx | faster-whisper. WhisperX bundles VAD + batched faster-whisper + forced alignment in one library and produces better word-level timestamps plus far fewer hallucinated segments than raw faster-whisper on long files. Falls back automatically to faster-whisper when the whisperx package isn't importable.
model_description: large-v3-turbo is the free ~2.5x speedup over large-v3 with <1% WER loss. large-v3 is the quality ceiling. medium / small useful only for low-VRAM rigs.
device_description: auto = cuda→cpu fallback. compute_type auto = float16 on GPU / int8 on CPU. Set explicitly to pin.

alignment.description: Run wav2vec2 forced alignment after ASR to get frame-accurate word-level timestamps. Required for the subtitle layer that Stage 7 burns in — without it, word timings come straight from Whisper decoding which can drift by 200-500 ms on long clips.

vocal_separation.description: Run Demucs v4 vocals stem separation before transcription. Adds ~60-120s overhead per hour of audio on a 4090 (much longer on CPU). Enable for streams with heavy background music / game audio drowning the streamer — IRL content, DJ sets, concerts, music-game streams. Default off because most Twitch content doesn't need it.

fallback_chunk_seconds_description: Only used by the faster-whisper fallback path. WhisperX's VAD-based chunking replaces this.
